case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. RACHEL M CRUZ AKA RACHEL M BUTAC AKA RACHEL BUTAC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B); VENUE FOR PERSONAL FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-09-2013. ROBERT COHEN APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT RACHEL M. CRUZ APPEARING AS SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: RVELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
